name: Panoramic Resources Limited
description: Panoramic Resources Limited is an Australian-based mining company primarily focused on the exploration and production of nickel, copper, and cobalt. The company is best known for operating the Savannah Nickel-Copper-Cobalt Project, located in the East Kimberley region of Western Australia. Established in 2001, Panoramic Resources has played a significant role in the regional mining sector, dedicated to the development and extraction of base metals. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker symbol PAN, reflecting its commitment to resource development and operational excellence within the Australian mining industry.
